text:
E・M・A is the 10th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

E, M, and A are the initial letters of the names of the three main characters of the series: Eren, Mikasa, and Armin.

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:45) has an up-beat grunting male choir, which is remixed in the track ymniam-orch (2:03-2:53). The second part (2:46-5:42) is more electronic.
